headline: Alger Russell Innovation Index Updates for First Quarter 2026
summary: Fred Alger Management, LLC ("Alger"), a privately held growth equity investment manager, today announced the quarterly rebalancing of the Alger Russell Innovation Index ("Index"). Following the close of trading on Friday, March 20, 2026, the Index will be rebalanced, and the following changes will be effective.
